name: IiNdlela zokuHambisa isigulana
description: Ukuhambisa ixhoba phantsi komlilo okanye kwindawo ekhuselekileyo yonyango. Indlela ixhomekeke kumhlaba, umgama, inani labahlanguli, kunye nokwenzakala kwengxwelerha. Isantya vs. ukunyanzelwa komqolo sisigqibo esinobuchule -- kwi-TCCC, isoyikiso sibaluleke kakhulu.
steps: UKUKHATHALELA PHANTSI KOMLILO: Buyisela umlilo kuqala ukuba uxhobile. Hambisa umntu owenzakeleyo usebenzisa eyona ndlela yokutsala ngokukhawuleza--ungayeki ukunyanga kwindawo yokubulala.
I-HASTY RAKA (umhlanguli omnye): bamba ikhola/umqheba wokutsala emagxeni, tsala ngasemva. Khusela intloko kwimpembelelo.
I-FIREMAN CARRY (umhlanguli omnye): phakamisa ixhoba phezu kwamagxa imigama emide -- kufuna ukuba umntu oshonile angabikho zingqondweni okanye asebenzisane.
UKUTHWALA KWABANTU ABABINI: abahlanguli badibanisa iingalo phantsi komqolo nasemadolweni exhoba. Ikhawuleza kunotsalo kumgama omfutshane.
ILITALA ONGAPHUCULIWEYO: beka iipali ezimbini ozii-intshi ezili-18 ukuqelelana. Uluke iibhatyi ngeepali ezinamaqhosha ngaphakathi. Vavanya phambi kokulayisha ingozi.
I-SKED LITTER: vula, tyibilika phantsi kokwenzakala, usonge kwaye ukhuseleke ngeentambo. Ifuna abathwali be-2-4.
Xa ulayisha: phakamisa ukubala kwe-3, gcina ukulungelelaniswa kwentloko / umzimba, ukunciphisa ukunyakaza komgogodla xa kunokwenzeka.
Ukuba umonzakalo womgogodla uyakrokrelwa kwaye akukho sisongelo: gcina uzinzo kwi-inline kuyo yonke intshukumo. Umntu omnye ozinikele kulawulo lwentloko.
Hambisa kwikhava, emva koko uphinde uvavanye i-ABC.
warnings: I-TCCC ephambili: ubomi> imilenze> ukunyameka komgogodla. Musa ukulibazisa intshukumo ukusuka kwindawo yokubulala ngenxa yokhuseleko lomqolo.
Ukuthwala koMlilo akuchanekanga xa kurhaneleka ukwenzakala komnqonqo, ukophuka kwe-femur, okanye umonzakalo ogqobhozayo wesisu.
Iilitha eziphuculweyo: vavanya ubunzima phambi kokuba uthembe umntu owenzakeleyo.
Ukuhambisa umntu owenzakeleyo nge-tourniquet: khangela i-tourniquet ayikhululekanga ngexesha lokunyakaza.

pediatric.note: Abantwana bakhaphukhaphu -- umhlanguli omnye unokuthwala ixesha elide. Gcina intloko ngokulinganayo inkulu -- iziko eliphezulu lomxhuzulane xa uthwele.

obstetric.note: Kuphephe ukuma okuxhaphakileyo okanye uxinzelelo kwisisu. I-Lateral (icala lasekhohlo likhethwayo) okanye ukuthuthwa kwe-supine nge-left hip wedge.
